steps.title: Close the appositive
steps.content: The phrase the site with the highest elevation renames site CC1 and must be closed with a comma before the sentence moves on. After that, it had shifted to 16.8 degrees C by 11:00 p.m. is a second independent clause.

steps.title: Choose the punctuation
steps.content: Choice A supplies and but does not close the appositive with a comma. Choice B leaves the appositive unclosed and creates a run-on. Choice C closes the appositive but joins two independent clauses with only a comma. The answer is D.
